composer: Yasunori Mitsuda, Nobuo Uematsu, Noriko Matsueda

audio_identity.overall_style: Video game soundtrack - one of the best video game soundtracks of all time
distinctive_elements: Multiple endings with corresponding musical themes
Time travel narrative reflected in compositional approach

note: The available sources contain limited music documentation. Data Crystal provides technical ROM information and references a 'Music Notation and Commands' documentation page, but the actual music content is not included in the provided source text. TCRF source is intentionally obfuscated per site policy. Wikipedia confirms the three composers and describes the soundtrack as critically acclaimed but does not provide tempo, key, chord progression, or detailed SFX characteristic data. Comprehensive music extraction would require access to the actual music documentation pages referenced but not provided.
